title: First Steps Pack of 3 Baby Bath Sponges - Soft & Gentle
features: WHAT'S INCLUDED: The set includes 1 x White Round Baby Sponges, 1 x Blue Whale Baby Sponge and 1 x Duck Baby Sponge. Suitable for newborn babies.
PRODUCT FEATURES: White sponge diameter: 10.5cm. Blue whale sponge: 9.5x7.5x4cm. Duck sponge: 10.5x8x4cm.
SOFT & GENTLE: These cute baby bath sponges are a perfect addition to your baby's bathtime. They are soft, gentle and care for baby's delicate, sensitive skin.
ADORABLE DESIGN: This pack of 3 foam sponges includes the blue whale and yellow duck designs that are perfect to comfort and soothe your baby in the bathtub.
PERFECT GIFT: The set of baby sponges is an ideal gift for baby's birthday, Christmas, or as a gift to give at a baby shower.
description: Product description Let your baby enjoy bath time with these soft baby sponge. Makes bathing experience more easier. Soft sponge that is gentle on baby's delicate skin. Ideal for keeping your little ones clean and fresh and promotes healthy skin. Baby's bath time essential, making this a perfect addition to baby gifts for Christening, baby shower, Christmas and welcoming a newborn baby. Directions [INFERRED] General usage instructions for a bath sponge. Safety Warning For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
